scripts.dev: (lsof -ti:3001 | xargs kill -TERM 2>/dev/null || true) && tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.dev:test: (lsof -ti:3001 | xargs kill -TERM 2>/dev/null || true) && APP_ENV=test tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.db:create:test: docker exec onboarding-portal-postgres-1 psql -U dev -d onboardingdb -tc "SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname = 'onboardingdb_test'" | grep -q 1 || docker exec onboarding-portal-postgres-1 psql -U dev -d onboardingdb -c 'CREATE DATABASE onboardingdb_test OWNER dev'
scripts.db:reset:test: docker exec onboarding-portal-postgres-1 psql -U dev -d onboardingdb -c 'DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS onboardingdb_test' && docker exec onboarding-portal-postgres-1 psql -U dev -d onboardingdb -c 'CREATE DATABASE onboardingdb_test OWNER dev' && pnpm db:migrate:test && pnpm db:seed:test
